room.caption: [CCityNorthShop] Getting up there early can be helpful.

instance.creationCode:
shopType=oShopWindow shopText="Tons of defensive items for you to browse." maxInv=4 inv[0]=14 inv[1]=15 inv[2]=16 inv[3]=17 inv[4]=0 sprite_index=sNPC_B_Idle image_speed=0.1 y-=20
if global.gameProgress<=980 {instance_destroy()}
